query: SELECT p.name, pv.name as variant, pv.stockQuantity, pv.inTransitQuantity FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE pv.stockQuantity > 0 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT p.name, pv.name as variant, pv.stockQuantity, pv.inTransitQuantity FROM product_variants pv JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE pv.stockQuantity > 0 LIMIT 10;
